onboarding.welcomePlaceholder: e.g. Welcome to our exclusive club! Enjoy premium perks and rewards.
onboarding.previewPlaceholder: Your welcome message will appear here...
onboarding.completeDesc: We've set up your wheel and default roles. Head to the Admin Panel to create your first staff and member accounts.
onboarding.nextStep1: Create staff accounts (code + PIN) so your team can access the Staff Console

landing.heroSubtitle: The all-in-one operating system for private clubs. Manage members, engage your community, and run daily operations — all under your own brand.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Three steps to launch your club's digital home.
landing.step1Desc: Pick a name, set your owner credentials, and we create your private space instantly.
landing.step2Desc: Choose your colors and hero content. Members see your brand, not ours.
landing.step3Desc: Register members in the admin panel, hand out codes, and your club is live.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Three portals. One platform. Zero hassle.
landing.featureMemberPortalDesc: White-label mobile-first app for your members. Login with a simple code, check spin balance, view history, and manage their profile.
landing.featureStaffConsoleDesc: Fast, single-action workflows for your team. Spin the wheel for members, track events, and manage services — all from one screen.
landing.featureAdminPanelDesc: Full control over your club. Manage members and staff, configure the prize wheel, define roles — secured with email and password.
landing.featureSpinWheelDesc: Gamify your club experience. Configure prizes, probabilities, and colors. Staff spins the wheel for members in one tap.
landing.featureWhiteLabelDesc: Your brand, your colors, your identity. Every member sees your club — not a generic platform. Custom colors applied everywhere.
landing.featureSecureDesc: Each club is completely separate. Row-level security ensures member data never leaks between clubs. Owner, staff, and member access are all distinct.
landing.builtForDesc: Whether you run a social club, cannabis association, members-only bar, or any private community — osocios gives you the tools to manage it professionally.
landing.setupTime: Set up takes less than 2 minutes. No credit card required.
landing.heroDescription: The membership platform that keeps your community coming back. Manage members, gamify engagement, and run daily operations — all under your brand.
landing.platformSubtitle: Every role gets the right tool — members, staff, and admins each have purpose-built interfaces.
landing.portalMemberDesc: A branded, mobile-first experience your members will love.
landing.portalStaffDesc: Fast, single-action workflows for your team.
landing.portalAdminDesc: Full control over your entire club operation.
landing.featuresSubtitle2: From gamified engagement to white-label branding — built for clubs that care about retention.
landing.featureEventsDesc: Create events, track RSVPs, and manage check-ins with automatic spin rewards.
landing.featureServicesDesc: Offer services, track orders, and manage fulfillment through staff.
landing.featureAmenitiesDesc: Offer activities, experiences, and products — managed through your staff.
landing.featureQuestsDesc: Assign missions — follow socials, refer friends, complete tutorials. Reward with spins.
landing.featureRolesDesc: Organize members into custom roles with distinct groupings.
landing.featureLogsDesc: Full audit trail of every spin, check-in, and quest completion.
landing.featureReferralsDesc: Built-in referral system. Members earn rewards for bringing friends.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle2: No demos, no sales calls. Create your club and start managing members immediately.
landing.useCasesTitle: Built for every type of club
landing.useCasesSubtitle: Whatever your community looks like, osocios adapts to fit.
landing.useCaseSocialDesc: Member directories, event management, and loyalty rewards.
landing.useCaseCannabisDesc: Compliant membership tracking, check-in logs, and engagement tools.
landing.useCaseBarsDesc: Visit rewards, spin-the-wheel gamification, and digital member cards.
landing.useCaseSportsDesc: Team management, event scheduling, and member engagement.
landing.useCaseCoworkingDesc: Access management, service bookings, and community tools.
landing.closingSubtitle: Join clubs already using osocios to boost retention and engage their community.
landing.closingReassurance: Set up in under 2 minutes. No credit card required.
landing.serviceFinderSubtitle: Browse services offered by clubs on osocios
landing.amenityFinderSubtitle: Browse offers from clubs on osocios
landing.membershipSubtitle: Find the right club and membership plan for you
landing.footerTagline: The operating system for private clubs

discover.subtitle: Find clubs, events, and offers near you
discover.ageGate.subtitle: Age Restricted Content
discover.ageGate.body: This platform features clubs and services intended for adults. By continuing, you confirm you are 18 years or older.

welcome.spinDesc: Use your earned spins to win prizes and rewards

admin.autoRegistrationDesc: Auto-create member account on pre-registration. Staff approval required to activate.
public.preregDesc: Plan ahead and let us know you're coming
public.preregAgeConfirm: I confirm all visitors are 18 years or older
public.preregDisclaimer: I understand the club reserves the right to deny entry
public.preregSentDesc: You'll receive a confirmation email shortly
staff.preregsDesc: Pre-registrations will appear here when visitors submit them
admin.emailNoRecipients: No members with email in this segment
email.unsubscribedDesc: You will no longer receive emails from this club
email.footer: You're receiving this because you shared your email with our club.
login.accountPendingApproval: Your account is pending approval. Please wait for staff to activate it.
sales.heroSubtitle: Turn every visit into loyalty. A gamified member portal, staff console, and admin panel — all under your brand.
sales.loopTitle: The loop that keeps members coming back
sales.loopSubtitle: Every visit feeds the next one.
sales.loopStep1Desc: Staff checks them in. They earn a spin.
sales.loopStep2Desc: Post, refer, attend — quests reward real actions.
sales.loopStep3Desc: Win offers, freebies, status. The wheel is yours to configure.
sales.loopStep4Desc: Rewards pull them back. The loop restarts.
sales.questsTitle: Your members are your marketing team
sales.questsSubtitle: Quests reward the behaviors you care about — referrals, social posts, reviews, check-ins. You set the rules. They do the work.
sales.questsBullet4: Custom quests: whatever moves your business
sales.showcasesTitle: Built for clubs, not generic loyalty
sales.showcaseSpinDesc: Configure prizes, probabilities, and cooldowns. Members spin from their phone. Staff approves wins in the console.
sales.showcaseQuestsDesc: Six quest types, bilingual, approval workflow, badges, and leveling. Launch in minutes from templates.
sales.showcaseEventsDesc: RSVPs, check-ins, capacity, public RSVP links, and post-event reminders. Built for recurring programming.
sales.showcaseEmailDesc: Segment your members, draft campaigns, and send from your own domain via Resend. Inbox delivery, not spam.
sales.whiteLabelDesc: Your logo, your colors, your tone. Members never see the osocios name unless you want them to.
sales.portalsMemberDesc: Branded mobile-first portal. Spin, quest, RSVP, earn.
sales.portalsStaffDesc: Check-ins, order fulfilment, quest approvals, PIN-protected.
sales.pricingSubtitle: We're finalizing tiers with our early clubs. Reach out to lock in founding-member pricing.
sales.pricingFreeDesc: Try the platform with your first members.
sales.pricingGrowthDesc: Active clubs with analytics and automation.
sales.finalCtaSubtitle: Spin up a club in 2 minutes. No credit card.
contact.title: Let's talk
contact.subtitle: We're a small team in Barcelona. We answer personally.
contact.whatsappDesc: Message us on WhatsApp for an instant reply.
contact.emailDesc: Prefer email? Fill this in and we'll get back within 24 hours.
contact.formSuccess: Thanks — we'll be in touch soon.
contact.formError: Something went wrong. Please try WhatsApp instead.
adminSetup.title: Finish setting up your club
adminSetup.subtitle: {done} of {total} complete
onboarding.completeCtaHint: We've prepped a 5-step setup checklist inside your admin panel. Jump in and you'll be live in minutes.
